summary: Excellent audience recording of a unique, great little show
review: The reviewer praises this tape as the best available audience source, noting very good sound quality and calling the concert a “great little” and “unique” performance. While no specific songs or musical details are mentioned, the overall tone is highly positive both for the recording and the show itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review; reviewer highlights excellent audience sound and a great, unique concert but provides no detailed musical analysis.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "very good sound" and the best available audience source; clear enough for listening despite being an audience tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
